positive: A minimalist, stylish design featuring a roaring, stylized tiger silhouette centered on a cream background. The tiger should be rendered with clean, thick linework and sharp, bold geometric patterns integrated into its stripes. Style: Mid-century modern art deco meets tribal tattoo art. Composition: Centered, high contrast, strong negative space. Color direction: Black linework and solid negative space against a creamy beige background, allowing for versatility on apparel. Lighting: Flat, studio lighting for perfect graphic clarity. Details: Suitable for screen printing, high-detail graphic vector style.
